Testname Status ResourceGroupName Links
Customer should not be able to deploy cluster with invalid name tbd rg-cluster-name-validation-kplk68 Hosted Control Plane Logs Service Logs
Customer should not be able to deploy 2 identically named clusters within the same resource group tbd rg-cluster-name-duplicate-qhkh6g Hosted Control Plane Logs Service Logs
Customer should be able to create an HCP cluster with Image Registry not present tbd disabled-image-registry-krz7zc Hosted Control Plane Logs Service Logs
